title: A dynamic temperature difference control recording system in shallow lake mesocosm
author: Wang, Xu, et al.

steps.title: Method validation
steps.instruction: This system have been used in our previous studies [8,9,12]. As shown in Fig. 2, We set up a simulated warming group which involving a sustained increase in temperature of 4°C above control ambient conditions by this temperature difference controll recording system [see 13]. Water temperature in the mesocosms followed the desired design.Fig. 2Mean daily water temperature in the mesocosms. Ambient temperature represent average water temperature in the unheated mesocosms, warming temperature represent average water temperature in the heated mesocosms, we design a 4°C temperature difference between them, error bars indicate ± standard error, n=12 replicates per treatment. Ambient temperature + 4°C represent the design values of warming temperature.Fig. 2
